## What problem does this solve?
<!-- The actual use case, not the feature. -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- What command / flag / behavior do you want? -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other approaches you've thought about. -->

## API / endpoint involved (if known)
<!-- HubSpot API path + version, e.g. GET /crm/v3/... -->

## Is it safe by default?
<!-- Is this a read, write, or delete? Any safety implications? -->
